Uses of Interface
org.moeaframework.core.Problem

Packages that use Problem
Package
Description
org.moeaframework
Convenience classes for using the MOEA Framework.
org.moeaframework.algorithm
Implementations of various algorithms and support tools for working with algorithms.
org.moeaframework.algorithm.extension
 
org.moeaframework.algorithm.pso
Implementations of various Particle Swarm Optimization (PSO) algorithms.
org.moeaframework.algorithm.sa
Implementations of various simulated annealing (SA) algorithms.
org.moeaframework.algorithm.single
Implementations of various single-objective optimization algorithms.
org.moeaframework.analysis
Tools for analyzing the runtime and end-of-run behavior of algorithms.
org.moeaframework.analysis.io
File formats used by the MOEA Framework analysis codes.
org.moeaframework.analysis.tools
Command line tools for evaluating MOEAs and analyzing results.
org.moeaframework.core
Contains the core classes used by this framework.
org.moeaframework.core.configuration
Support for configuring algorithms.
org.moeaframework.core.fitness
Implementations of various fitness assignment methods.
org.moeaframework.core.indicator
Collection of unary quality indicators for comparing the quality of non-dominated approximation sets.
org.moeaframework.core.initialization
Package of various initialization operators.
org.moeaframework.core.spi
Defines the service provider interfaces (SPIs) and factories for constructing problems, algorithms and operators.
org.moeaframework.parallel
Support for distributed and parallel computing for optimization algorithms.
org.moeaframework.problem
Package containing standardized problems and utility classes for working with problems.
org.moeaframework.problem.BBOB2016
Package containing the BBOB 2016 bi-objective test problems.
org.moeaframework.problem.CDTLZ
Package for the constrained DTLZ test problems.
org.moeaframework.problem.CEC2009
Test problems used for the CEC 2009 special session and competition.
org.moeaframework.problem.DTLZ
Package for the scalable DTLZ test problem suite.
org.moeaframework.problem.LSMOP
Package for the scalable LSMOP test problem suite.
org.moeaframework.problem.LZ
Package for the complicated Pareto sets test suite by Hui Li and Qingfu Zhang.
org.moeaframework.problem.MaF
The MaF test problem suite for many-objective optimization.
org.moeaframework.problem.misc
Collection of unconstrained and constrained numeric multiobjective test problems aggregated by Van Veldhuizen [1].
org.moeaframework.problem.single
Collection of single-objective optimization algorithms.
org.moeaframework.problem.WFG
Implementation of the Walking Fish Group (WFG) test suite of scalable multiobjective problems.
org.moeaframework.problem.ZCAT
Package for the scalable ZCAT test problem suite.
org.moeaframework.problem.ZDT
Package for the ZDT test problem suite.
org.moeaframework.util.distributed
Classes to enable distributed computing.
org.moeaframework.util.validate
Methods for validating inputs, arguments, and properties.
org.moeaframework.util.weights
Routines for generating weights for decomposition and reference point methods.

  • Uses of Problem in org.moeaframework

    Methods in org.moeaframework that return Problem
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected Problem
    Executor.getDistributedProblemInstance()
    When configured to run on multiple threads or with an , will wrap the problem instance in a distributed problem.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected static final Selection
    NSGAIII.getDefaultSelection(Problem problem)
    Gets the default selection operator.
    protected static final Variation
    NSGAIII.getDefaultVariation(Problem problem)
    Returns the default variation operator for the problem type.
    protected static final int
    NSGAIII.getInitialPopulationSize(Problem problem, NormalBoundaryDivisions divisions)
    Returns the population size, which is the number of reference points rounded up to the nearest multiple of 4.
    Constructors in org.moeaframework.algorithm with parameters of type Problem
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    AbstractAlgorithm(Problem problem)
    Constructs an abstract algorithm for solving the specified problem.
     
    AbstractEvolutionaryAlgorithm(Problem problem, int initialPopulationSize, Population population, NondominatedPopulation archive, Initialization initialization, Variation variation)
    Constructs an abstract evolutionary algorithm.
     
    AGEMOEAII(Problem problem)
    Constructs the AGE-MOEA-II algorithm with default settings.
     
    AGEMOEAII(Problem problem, int initialPopulationSize, org.moeaframework.algorithm.AGEMOEAII.AGEMOEAIIPopulation population, Selection selection, Variation variation, Initialization initialization)
    Constructs the AGE-MOEA-II algorithm with the specified components.
     
    CMAES(Problem problem)
    Constructs a new CMA-ES intance using default parameters.
     
    CMAES(Problem problem, int lambda, IndicatorFitnessEvaluator fitnessEvaluator, NondominatedPopulation archive)
    Constructs a new CMA-ES instance using default parameters.
     
    CMAES(Problem problem, int lambda, IndicatorFitnessEvaluator fitnessEvaluator, NondominatedPopulation archive, double[] initialSearchPoint, boolean checkConsistency, double cc, double cs, double damps, double ccov, double ccovsep, double sigma, int diagonalIterations)
    Constructs a new CMA-ES instance with the given parameters.
     
    DBEA(Problem problem)
    Constructs a new instance of the DBEA algorithm with default settings.
     
    DBEA(Problem problem, NormalBoundaryDivisions divisions)
    Constructs a new instance of the DBEA algorithm with the given number of divisions.
     
    EpsilonMOEA(Problem problem)
    Constructs the ε-MOEA algorithm with default settings.

    Constructs the ε-MOEA algorithm with the specified components.

    Constructs the ε-MOEA algorithm with the specified components.

    Constructs a new ε-NSGA-II instance with default settings.

    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    ResultFileReader(Problem problem, File file)
    Constructs a result file reader for reading the approximation sets from the specified result file.
     
    ResultFileWriter(Problem problem, File file, ResultFileWriter.ResultFileWriterSettings settings)
    Constructs a result file writer for writing the decision variables and objectives of a sequence of non-dominated populations to a file.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static Indicators
    Indicators.all(Problem problem, NondominatedPopulation referenceSet)
    Creates an instance of this class that evaluates all performance indicators.
    void
    DefaultNormalizer.disableNormalization(Problem problem)
    Disables normalization for the given problem.
    static int
    RIndicator.getDefaultSubdivisions(Problem problem)
    Returns the default number of subdivisions for a given problem.
    Normalizer
    DefaultNormalizer.getHypervolumeNormalizer(Problem problem, NondominatedPopulation referenceSet)
    Returns the normalizer used for hypervolume calculations for the given problem and reference set.
    Normalizer
    DefaultNormalizer.getNormalizer(Problem problem, NondominatedPopulation referenceSet)
    Returns the normalizer configured for the given problem and reference set.
    protected static void
    NativeHypervolume.invert(Problem problem, Solution solution)
    Inverts the objective values since this hypervolume algorithm operates on maximization problems.
    protected static void
    PISAHypervolume.invert(Problem problem, Solution solution)
    Inverts the objective values since this hypervolume algorithm operates on maximization problems.
    protected static double
    NativeHypervolume.invokeNativeHypervolume(Problem problem, Population population, boolean isInverted)
    Generates the input files and calls the executable to calculate hypervolume.
    static Indicators
    Indicators.of(Problem problem, NondominatedPopulation referenceSet)
    Creates a new instance of this class with no configured indicators.
    void
    DefaultNormalizer.override(Problem problem, double[] minimum, double[] maximum)
    Provides specific minimum and maximum bounds used for normalizing the given problem.
    static Indicators
    Indicators.standard(Problem problem, NondominatedPopulation referenceSet)
    Creates an instance of this class that evaluates all standard performance indicators.

    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    AdditiveEpsilonIndicator(Problem problem, NondominatedPopulation referenceSet)
    Constructs an additive ε-indicator evaluator for the specified problem and corresponding reference set.
     
    AdditiveEpsilonIndicator(Problem problem, NondominatedPopulation referenceSet, Normalizer normalizer)
    Constructs an additive ε-indicator evaluator with a user-provided normalizer.
     
    GenerationalDistance(Problem problem, NondominatedPopulation referenceSet)
    Constructs a generational distance evaluator for the specified problem and corresponding reference set.

    Constructs a generational distance evaluator for the specified problem and corresponding reference set.

    Constructs a generational distance evaluator with a user-provided normalizer.
     
    GenerationalDistancePlus(Problem problem, NondominatedPopulation referenceSet)
    Constructs a generational distance plus evaluator for the specified problem and corresponding reference set.
     
    GenerationalDistancePlus(Problem problem, NondominatedPopulation referenceSet, Normalizer normalizer)
    Constructs a generational distance plus evaluator with a user-provided normalizer.
     
    Hypervolume(Problem problem, double[] minimum, double[] maximum)
    Constructs a hypervolume evaluator for the specified problem using the given minimum and maximum bounds.
     
    Hypervolume(Problem problem, Normalizer normalizer)
    Constructs a hypervolume evaluator with a user-provided normalizer.
     
    Hypervolume(Problem problem, NondominatedPopulation referenceSet)
    Constructs a hypervolume evaluator for the specified problem and reference set.
     
    Hypervolume(Problem problem, NondominatedPopulation referenceSet, double[] referencePoint)
    Constructs a hypervolume evaluator for the specified problem using the given reference set and reference point.

    Constructs a new Indicators object for the given problem.

    NormalizedIndicator(Problem problem, NondominatedPopulation referenceSet, Normalizer normalizer)
    Constructs a normalized indicator for the specified problem, reference set, and normalizer.
     
    Normalizer(Problem problem, double[] minimum, double[] maximum)
    Deprecated.
    Use Normalizer(double[], double[]) instead
     
    Normalizer(Problem problem, Population population)
    Deprecated.
    Use Normalizer(Population) instead
     
    Normalizer(Problem problem, Population population, double delta)
    Deprecated.
    Use Normalizer(Population, double) instead
     
    Normalizer(Problem problem, Population population, double[] referencePoint)
    Deprecated.
    Use Normalizer(Population, double[]) instead
     
    PISAHypervolume(Problem problem, Normalizer normalizer)
    Constructs a hypervolume evaluator for the specified problem using the given minimum and maximum bounds.
     
    PISAHypervolume(Problem problem, NondominatedPopulation referenceSet)
    Constructs a hypervolume evaluator for the specified problem and reference set.
     
    R1Indicator(Problem problem, int subdivisions, NondominatedPopulation referenceSet)
    Constructs a new R1 indicator using the Chebyshev utility function.
     
    R1Indicator(Problem problem, int subdivisions, NondominatedPopulation referenceSet, Normalizer normalizer, RIndicator.UtilityFunction utilityFunction, double epsilon)
    Constructs a new R1 indicator using the specified utility function.
     
    R2Indicator(Problem problem, int subdivisions, NondominatedPopulation referenceSet)
    Constructs a new R2 indicator using the Chebyshev utility function.
     
    R2Indicator(Problem problem, int subdivisions, NondominatedPopulation referenceSet, Normalizer normalizer, RIndicator.UtilityFunction utilityFunction)
    Constructs a new R2 indicator using the specified utility function.
     
    R3Indicator(Problem problem, int subdivisions, NondominatedPopulation referenceSet)
    Constructs a new R3 indicator using the Chebyshev utility function.
     
    R3Indicator(Problem problem, int subdivisions, NondominatedPopulation referenceSet, Normalizer normalizer, RIndicator.UtilityFunction utilityFunction)
    Constructs a new R3 indicator using the specified utility function.
     
    RIndicator(Problem problem, int subdivisions, NondominatedPopulation referenceSet, Normalizer normalizer, RIndicator.UtilityFunction utilityFunction)
    Constructs a new R indicator using the specified utility function.
     
    Spacing(Problem problem)
    Constructs a spacing metric evaluator for the specified problem.
     
    WFGHypervolume(Problem problem, double[] referencePoint)
    Constructs a new WFG hypervolume instance with the given reference point.
     
    WFGHypervolume(Problem problem, NondominatedPopulation referenceSet)
    Constructs a new WFG hypervolume instance with the given reference set.
     
    WFGNormalizedHypervolume(Problem problem, Normalizer normalizer)
    Constructs a hypervolume evaluator for the specified problem using the given normalizer.
     
    WFGNormalizedHypervolume(Problem problem, NondominatedPopulation referenceSet)
    Constructs a hypervolume evaluator for the specified problem and reference set.

  • Uses of Problem in org.moeaframework.core.initialization

    Fields in org.moeaframework.core.initialization declared as Problem
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    protected final Problem
    RandomInitialization.problem
    The problem.
    Constructors in org.moeaframework.core.initialization with parameters of type Problem
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    InjectedInitialization(Problem problem, List<Solution> injectedSolutions)
    Constructs a random initialization operator that includes one or more pre-defined solutions.
     
    InjectedInitialization(Problem problem, Solution... injectedSolutions)
    Constructs a random initialization operator that includes one or more pre-defined solutions.
     
    RandomInitialization(Problem problem)
    Constructs a random initialization operator.

  • Uses of Problem in org.moeaframework.core.spi

    Methods in org.moeaframework.core.spi that return Problem
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Problem
    ProblemFactory.getProblem(String name)
    Searches through all discovered ProblemProvider instances, returning an instance of the problem with the registered name.
    abstract Problem
    ProblemProvider.getProblem(String name)
    Returns the problem with the specified name, or null if this provider does not support the problem.
    Problem
    RegisteredProblemProvider.getProblem(String name)
     
    Methods in org.moeaframework.core.spi with parameters of type Problem
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Algorithm
    AlgorithmFactory.getAlgorithm(String name, Problem problem)
    Searches through all discovered AlgorithmProvider instances, returning an instance of the algorithm with the registered name.
    Algorithm
    AlgorithmFactory.getAlgorithm(String name, TypedProperties properties, Problem problem)
    Searches through all discovered AlgorithmProvider instances, returning an instance of the algorithm with the registered name.
    abstract Algorithm
    AlgorithmProvider.getAlgorithm(String name, TypedProperties properties, Problem problem)
    Returns the algorithm with the specified name, or null if this provider does not support the algorithm.
    Algorithm
    IndirectAlgorithmProvider.getAlgorithm(String name, TypedProperties properties, Problem problem)
     
    Algorithm
    RegisteredAlgorithmProvider.getAlgorithm(String name, TypedProperties properties, Problem problem)
     
    Mutation
    OperatorFactory.getMutation(String name, TypedProperties properties, Problem problem)
    Returns the suggested mutation operator for the given problem.
    Mutation
    OperatorFactory.getMutation(Problem problem)
    Returns the suggested mutation operator for the given problem.
    abstract String
    OperatorProvider.getMutationHint(Problem problem)
    Returns the name of the suggested mutation operator for the given problem, or null if no hint is available.
    String
    RegisteredOperatorProvider.getMutationHint(Problem problem)
     
    Variation
    OperatorFactory.getVariation(String name, Problem problem)
    Returns the named variation operator using default settings.
    Variation
    OperatorFactory.getVariation(String name, TypedProperties properties, Problem problem)
    Returns an instance of the variation operator with the specified name.
    Variation
    OperatorFactory.getVariation(Problem problem)
    Returns the suggested variation operator for the given problem.
    abstract Variation
    OperatorProvider.getVariation(String name, TypedProperties properties, Problem problem)
    Returns an instance of the variation operator with the specified name.
    Variation
    RegisteredOperatorProvider.getVariation(String name, TypedProperties properties, Problem problem)
     
    abstract String
    OperatorProvider.getVariationHint(Problem problem)
    Returns the name of the suggested variation operator for the given problem, or null if no hint is available.
    String
    RegisteredOperatorProvider.getVariationHint(Problem problem)
     
    Method parameters in org.moeaframework.core.spi with type arguments of type Problem
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected final void
    RegisteredAlgorithmProvider.register(BiFunction<TypedProperties,Problem,Algorithm> constructor, String... names)
    Registers a new algorithm with this provider.
    protected final void
    RegisteredOperatorProvider.register(String name, BiFunction<TypedProperties,Problem,Variation> constructor)
    Registers a new operator with this provider.
    protected final void
    RegisteredProblemProvider.register(String name, Supplier<Problem> constructor, String referenceSet)
    Registers a new problem with this provider.

  • Uses of Problem in org.moeaframework.parallel

    Classes in org.moeaframework.parallel that implement Problem
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    DistributedProblem
    Distributes the DistributedProblem.evaluate(Solution) method across multiple threads, cores or compute nodes using the provided ExecutorService.
    Methods in org.moeaframework.parallel with parameters of type Problem
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static DistributedProblem
    DistributedProblem.from(Problem problem)
    Creates a distributed problem using the number of available processors on the local computer.
    static DistributedProblem
    DistributedProblem.from(Problem problem, int numberOfThreads)
    Creates a distributed problem using a fixed number of threads.
    Constructors in org.moeaframework.parallel with parameters of type Problem
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    DistributedProblem(Problem problem, ExecutorService executor)
    Decorates a problem for distributing the evaluation of the problem across multiple threads, cores or compute nodes as defined by the specified ExecutorService.
     
    DistributedProblem(Problem problem, ExecutorService executor, boolean shutdownWhenClosed)
    Decorates a problem for distributing the evaluation of the problem across multiple threads, cores or compute nodes as defined by the specified ExecutorService.

  • Uses of Problem in org.moeaframework.problem

    Subinterfaces of Problem in org.moeaframework.problem
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    AnalyticalProblem
    Interface for problems whose Pareto optimal set is known analytically, providing the AnalyticalProblem.generate() method for producing randomly-generated reference sets.
    Classes in org.moeaframework.problem that implement Problem
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AbstractProblem
    Abstract class for a Problem.
    class 
    ExternalProblem
    Evaluate solutions using an externally-defined problem.
    class 
    ProblemStub
    A problem stub with a defined number of objectives, but no decision variables or constraints.
    class 
    ProblemWrapper
    Wraps a problem instance to modify or extend its functionality.
    class 
    RotatedProblem
    Decorator to create rotated variants of test problems.
    class 
    ScaledProblem
    Decorator to create scaled variants of problems.
    class 
    ScriptedProblem
    Permits interfacing with problems implemented by one of the many scripting languages supported by the Java Scripting APIs.
    class 
    TimingProblem
    Wraps a problem to collect objective function evaluation timing data.
    Fields in org.moeaframework.problem declared as Problem
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    protected final Problem
    ProblemWrapper.problem
    The original problem instance.
    Methods in org.moeaframework.problem that return Problem
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Problem
    ClassLoaderProblems.getProblem(String name)
     
    Problem
    ProblemException.getProblem()
    Returns the problem responsible for this exception.
    Problem
    PropertiesProblems.getProblem(String name)
     
    Problem
    RotatedProblems.getProblem(String name)
     
    Constructors in org.moeaframework.problem with parameters of type Problem
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    ProblemException(Problem problem)
    Constructs an problem exception originating from the specified problem.
     
    ProblemException(Problem problem, String message)
    Constructs an problem exception originating from the specified problem with the given message.
     
    ProblemException(Problem problem, String message, Throwable cause)
    Constructs an problem exception originating from the specified problem with the given cause.
     
    ProblemException(Problem problem, Throwable cause)
    Constructs an problem exception originating from the specified problem with the given cause.
    protected
    ProblemWrapper(Problem problem)
    Constructs a new problem wrapper to modify or extend the functionality of the given problem.
     
    RotatedProblem(Problem problem, org.apache.commons.math3.linear.RealMatrix rotation)
    Decorates the specified problem, creating a rotated instance using the specified rotation matrix.
     
    ScaledProblem(Problem problem, double base)
    Constructs a new scaled problem.
     
    TimingProblem(Problem problem)
    Decorates the specified problem to collecting objective function evaluation timing data.

  • Uses of Problem in org.moeaframework.problem.BBOB2016

    Classes in org.moeaframework.problem.BBOB2016 that implement Problem
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AttractiveSector
    The Attractive Sector function.
    class 
    BBOBFunction
    Abstract class for the functions provided by the BBOB test suite.
    class 
    BBOBTransformation
    Abstract class for transformations provided by the BBOB test suite.
    class 
    DifferentPowers
    The Different Powers function.
    class 
    Ellipsoid
    The Ellipsoid function.
    class 
    Gallagher
    The 101-peak Gallagher function.
    class 
    Rastrigin
    The Rastrigin function.
    class 
    Rosenbrock
    The Rosenbrock function.
    class 
    Schaffers
    The Schaffers F7 function.
    class 
    Schwefel
    The Schwefel function.
    class 
    SharpRidge
    The Sharp Ridge function.
    class 
    Sphere
    The sphere function.
    class 
    StackedProblem
    Combines two or more single-objective BBOBFunctions into a multiobjective problem.
    class 
    TransformObjectiveOscillate
    Transformation that oscillates the objective values of the inner function.
    class 
    TransformObjectivePenalize
    Transformation that penalizes the objectives if the decision variables fall outside the region of interest.
    class 
    TransformObjectivePower
    Transformation that raises the objective value to the power of a given exponent.
    class 
    TransformObjectiveShift
    Transformation that offsets the value of the objective by a fixed amount.
    class 
    TransformVariablesAffine
    Performs an affine transformation of the form f(x) = Mx + b.
    class 
    TransformVariablesAsymmetric
    Transformation used to convert a symmetric to an asymmetric decision space.
    class 
    TransformVariablesBrs
    Transformation that skews or scales the decision variables using the same method described by the Buche-Rastrigin function.
    class 
    TransformVariablesConditioning
    Transformation that alters the condition number of the function.
    class 
    TransformVariablesOscillate
    Transformation that applies a monotone oscillation to the decision variables of the inner function.
    class 
    TransformVariablesScale
    Transformation that scales the decision variables by a given factor.
    class 
    TransformVariablesShift
    Transformation that shifts all decision variables by a given offset.
    class 
    TransformVariablesXHat
    The x-hat transformation, which negates some of the decision variables.
    class 
    TransformVariablesZHat
    The z-hat transformation used by the Schwefel function.
    Methods in org.moeaframework.problem.BBOB2016 that return Problem
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Problem
    BBOB2016Problems.getProblem(String name)

    LZ
    Abstract class for implementing problems from the complicated Pareto sets test suite by Hui Li and Qingfu Zhang.

    LZ1

  • Uses of Problem in org.moeaframework.problem.MaF

    Classes in org.moeaframework.problem.MaF that implement Problem
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    MaF1
    The MaF1 test problem, which is a modified inverted version of the DTLZ1 test problem.
    class 
    MaF10
    The MaF10 test problem, which is identical to the WFG1 test problem.
    class 
    MaF11
    The MaF11 test problem, which is identical to the WFG2 test problem.
    class 
    MaF12
    The MaF12 test problem, which is identical to the WFG9 test problem.
    class 
    MaF13
    The MaF13 test problem.
    class 
    MaF14
    The MaF14 test problem, which is identical to the LSMOP3 test problem with N_k=2 and N_ns=20.
    class 
    MaF15
    The MaF15 test problem, which is an inverted version of the LSMOP8 test problem with N_k=2 and N_ns=20..
    class 
    MaF2
    The MaF2 test problem, also known as the "DTLZ2BZ" problem.
    class 
    MaF3
    The MaF3 test problem, which is a convex version of the DTLZ3 problem.
    class 
    MaF4
    The MaF4 test problem, which is an inverted and badly scaled version of the DTLZ3 problem.
    class 
    MaF5
    The MaF5 test problem, which is a convex and badly scaled version of the DTLZ4 problem.
    class 
    MaF6
    The MaF6 test problem, also known as the "DTLZ5(I,M)" problem with I=2.
    class 
    MaF7
    The MaF7 test problem, which is identical to the DTLZ7 test problem.
    class 
    MaF8
    The MaF8 test problem.
    class 
    MaF9
    The MaF9 test problem.
    Methods in org.moeaframework.problem.MaF that return Problem
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Problem
    MaFProblemProvider.getProblem(String name)

  • Uses of Problem in org.moeaframework.problem.single

    Classes in org.moeaframework.problem.single that implement Problem
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    Ackley
    The single-objective Ackley problem with an optimum at x = (0, 0) with f(x) = 0.
    class 
    Beale
    The single-objective Beale problem with an optimum at x = (3.0, 0.5) with f(x) = 0.
    class 
    Griewank
    The single-objective Griewank problem with an optimum at x = (0, ..., 0) with f(x) = 0.
    class 
    Himmelblau
    The single-objective Himmelblau's function with four local minima, all with f(x) = 0.
    class 
    Rastrigin
    The single-objective Rastrigin problem with an optimum at x = (0, ..., 0) with f(x) = 0.
    class 
    Rosenbrock
    The single-objective Rosenbrock problem with an optimum at x = (1, 1) with f(x) = 0.
    class 
    Schwefel
    The single-objective Schwefel problem with an optimum at x = (420.9687, ..., 420.9687) with f(x) = 0.
    class 
    Sphere
    The single-objective Sphere problem with an optimum at x = (0, ..., 0) with f(x) = 0.
    class 
    Zakharov
    The single-objective Zakharov problem with an optimum at x = (0, ..., 0) with f(x) = 0.

  • Uses of Problem in org.moeaframework.util.weights

    Methods in org.moeaframework.util.weights with parameters of type Problem
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static NormalBoundaryDivisions
    NormalBoundaryDivisions.forProblem(Problem problem)
    Returns the default number of divisions based on the number of objectives.
    static NormalBoundaryDivisions
    NormalBoundaryDivisions.fromProperties(TypedProperties properties, Problem problem)
    Reads the divisions properties, if set, or provides default values for the problem.
    int
    NormalBoundaryDivisions.getNumberOfReferencePoints(Problem problem)
    Determines the number of reference points that would be produced using the given number of objectives and divisions.
